codeReview.summary: The fix commit correctly addresses the original scrutiny blockers for VAL-DAEMON-008 behavior and handoff commit traceability, but it does not complete the feature requirement to align mission-core-worker SKILL test filter snippets with BurnBar* commands.

issues.description: Feature expectedBehavior requires SKILL test filter snippets to match BurnBar* commands, but SKILL.md still uses OpenBurnBar* filters (e.g., OpenBurnBarMissionControlContractsTests/OpenBurnBarMissionControlServiceTests/OpenBurnBarProviderRouterTests) in both work procedure and example handoff. This remains misaligned with canonical commands in .factory/services.yaml (BurnBarMissionControlContractsTests, BurnBarMissionControlServiceTests, BurnBarProviderRouterTests).

sharedStateObservations.observation: mission-core-worker SKILL command snippets are still out of sync with .factory/services.yaml test filters, so workers can continue to run mismatched/no-match filters despite this fix feature targeting that exact alignment.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: .factory/skills/mission-core-worker/SKILL.md:22-24,39,44 use OpenBurnBar* filters; .factory/services.yaml test_daemon_mission/test_core_contracts/test_router use BurnBar* filters.

summary: Reviewed fix transcript skeleton plus both feature diffs (original 62ef19b8 and fix 26631b94). The fix now enforces unsupported-workflow hard-fail pre-execution and demonstrates commitId traceability against relevant files, but the SKILL BurnBar* command-alignment requirement is still incomplete, so the feature remains failing.
